profile.name: Shivanshu Siyanwal
profile.title: Quantum Software Engineer
profile.tagline: I build hybrid quantum-classical software — from variational algorithms and quantum ML to FPGA-accelerated inference and photonic network simulation.
profile.summary: Quantum Software Engineer with 4+ years spanning quantum algorithm research and production software. I work across the full stack of quantum computing: variational algorithms (VQE/VQC/VQLS), quantum machine learning, quantum error correction, and photonic quantum networks — and I ship them as tested, deployable software on GPUs, FPGAs, and cloud quantum backends. Published in quantum ML, quantum cryptography, and NMR quantum simulation.
profile.availability: Open to PhD / research-Master's positions and industry Quantum R&D roles.

experience.org: CDAC (Centre for Development of Advanced Computing)
experience.summary: Hybrid quantum-classical pipelines and FPGA-accelerated quantum inference on cloud simulation infrastructure.
points: Built hybrid quantum-classical pipelines for weather forecasting using a 7-qubit VQC (50 parameters), achieving 56.5% improvement over statistical baselines, deployed on cloud simulation infrastructure.
Implemented and optimised VQE, QCNN, and fidelity-based kernels in Qiskit and PennyLane; built scalable modules for quantum image encoding (FRQI, QPIE, NEQR).
Deployed a custom VQC kernel on an AMD Alveo U55C FPGA via HLS and HBM — 6.7× speedup over GPUs at 291.8 µs inference — integrated into CI/CD pipelines.
Collaborated across hardware, research, and engineering teams to optimise hybrid workflows and support cloud quantum platforms.

experience.org: Dr. Arpita Maitra, IAI, TCG CREST
experience.role: Project Junior Research Fellow — Quantum Networks & Linear Optics
experience.summary: Simulated linear-optical QKD testbeds with realistic photonic impairments and security analysis.
points: Designed and simulated linear-optical QKD testbeds (DPS, COW, Twin-Field) in OptiSystem and ANSYS, modelling realistic photonic loss and noise.
Performed error modelling and security analysis against intercept-resend and PNS attacks; benchmarked resource-state and entanglement generation.
Built Python post-processing tools for optical simulation data — reusable, maintainable quantum-network simulation software.

experience.org: Dr. Arpita Maitra, IAI, TCG CREST
experience.role: Research Intern — Quantum Cryptography & Circuit Design
experience.summary: Quantum circuits for block ciphers and a Grover-based chosen-ciphertext attack.
points: Designed quantum circuits for block ciphers (Mini-AES, S-AES) and Galois-field arithmetic; validated on Qiskit simulators and IBM Quantum hardware.
Demonstrated a chosen-ciphertext attack using Grover's search and amplitude amplification; contributed to error correction and circuit optimisation.

experience.summary: Variational algorithms for finance and time-series on AWS Braket and Rigetti hardware.
points: Implemented and optimised VQC, QBM, and VQLS for time-series forecasting and financial analysis on AWS Braket and Rigetti hardware.
Developed quantum data-encoding techniques (amplitude, phase, angle) and Ising-Hamiltonian circuits; contributed to the MeitY-QCAL Dicke-state simulation project.

research.org: NMR QC Group, Prof. Kavita Dorai — IISER Mohali
research.role: MS Research — NMR Entanglement Detection & Quantum Simulation
research.summary: Neural networks for multipartite entanglement detection in NMR systems.
points: Designed neural-network models for genuine multipartite entanglement detection and SLOCC classification in 2- and 3-qubit NMR systems (published in Quantum Information Processing).
Performed experimental density-matrix reconstruction and quantum error modelling; applied PCA, MCA, and LDA to quantum datasets.

projects.name: Hybrid VQC Weather Forecasting with FPGA Inference
projects.blurb: 7-qubit variational circuit for temperature forecasting, with a custom kernel on an AMD Alveo FPGA for low-latency inference.
projects.abstract: A hybrid quantum-classical pipeline that forecasts temperature using a 7-qubit variational quantum circuit (50 parameters). The trained inference kernel is compiled to an AMD Alveo U55C FPGA using HLS with HBM memory, reaching 291.8 µs inference — a 6.7× speedup over GPU execution — and is wired into CI/CD for continuous testing.

projects.name: Quantum Image Representation Neural Networks
projects.blurb: Quantum neural networks for binary image classification using FRQI, QPIE, and NEQR encodings.
projects.abstract: Quantum neural networks that classify binary images by encoding pixel data through several quantum image representations (FRQI, QPIE, NEQR) and comparing their expressivity and trainability. Currently under review at Springer Nature.

projects.name: Linear-Optical QKD Network Testbeds
projects.blurb: DPS, COW, and Twin-Field QKD simulated over realistic photonic channels with security analysis.
projects.abstract: Simulation testbeds for differential-phase-shift (DPS), coherent-one-way (COW), and Twin-Field QKD protocols over lossy, noisy photonic channels. Includes security analysis against intercept-resend and photon-number-splitting attacks, plus Python tooling for optical simulation post-processing.

projects.name: Quantum Circuits for Block Ciphers
projects.blurb: Mini-AES / S-AES circuits with a Grover-based chosen-ciphertext attack demonstration.
projects.abstract: Quantum circuit designs for Mini-AES and S-AES block ciphers with Galois-field arithmetic, validated on Qiskit simulators and IBM Quantum hardware. Demonstrates a chosen-ciphertext attack via Grover's search and amplitude amplification.

projects.name: Entanglement Detection via Neural Networks (NMR)
projects.blurb: ANN models for multipartite entanglement detection and SLOCC classification in NMR qubits.
projects.abstract: Neural-network models that detect genuine multipartite entanglement and classify SLOCC classes in 2- and 3-qubit NMR systems, trained on reconstructed density matrices. Published in Quantum Information Processing (Springer).

publications.title: Hybrid Variational Quantum Circuits based Temperature Forecasting with Low-Latency FPGA Inference
Quantum Machine Learning Models for Enhanced Weather Prediction
Quantum Image Representations based Quantum Neural Networks for Binary Classification
Entanglement Detection in 3-Qubit NMR States via Artificial Neural Networks

education.degree: Dual BS-MS (Postgraduate) — Major: Physics; Minor: Data Sciences
education.note: Five-year integrated programme; MS research in NMR quantum computing.
